page_metadata.bioconda__summary: reference-free small variant caller for short read sequencing data
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: This software is designed for discovering single nucleotide polymorphism (snp) from raw set(s) of reads obtained with next generation sequencers (ngs).
page_metadata.biotools__summary: This software is designed for discovering Single Nucleotide Polymorphism (SNP) from raw set(s) of reads obtained with Next Generation Sequencers (NGS).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This software is designed for discovering Single Nucleotide Polymorphism (SNP) from raw set(s) of reads obtained with Next Generation Sequencers (NGS).
